mainEntity.name: What are the deadlines for content updates to stay in Phoenix AI Overviews?
mainEntity.text: What are the deadlines for content updates to stay in Phoenix AI Overviews?

acceptedAnswer.text: Update Phoenix attorney content quarterly for freshness, especially post-law changes, as AI prioritizes recent, relevant pages.

suggestedAnswer.text: Phoenix's dynamic market requires monitoring Arizona legislation. Schedule audits every 90 days; stale content drops fast in AI synthesis.

name: Content Update Deadlines for Phoenix AI
